finding_results.notes: Condensed Silas's realization into one explicit theft formulation, then moved the remaining close through downstream rent/supply consequences, ferry snapshots, and Junie's sign under visible threat.
Replaced the meta chapter-book phrasing with an in-world signboard comparison so the wrist pain stops organizing Silas's shame without breaking close-third texture.

summary: Revised the closing ferry movement to state the campaign's erasure logic once, then let the ending advance through concrete civic consequences and Silas's changed view of Junie's sign, while replacing the immersion-breaking meta metaphor with an in-world signage image.
